RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0020 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: James Patel Date of Birth: 25/07/1999 SSN (tokenized): TKN-426928 Annual Income: $40,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $39,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN19774AL Tesla F-150 2021 EV New 46,000 Authorized Signature: James Patel
